column1: Check if emergency stop is triggered when over-temperature is detected.
Verify digital output signal when start button is pressed.
Test Ethernet connection between PLC and HMI.
Ensure PLC communication resumes after restart.
Check response when the safety lock is disengaged.
Test manual override function in maintenance mode.
Validate alarm trigger on pressure drop.
Ensure fail-safe mode activates on sensor failure.
Monitor cycle time deviation beyond threshold.
Inspect behavior when power is lost and restored.
